title: GIF export tool (video history)
description: Video-only 'Export GIF' tool in Group History. Controls: fps, size preset (both-axis WxAUTO / AUTOxH), loop count, control-bar trim. Manual 'Generate preview' runs real ffmpeg GIF encode → inline animated preview + real file-size badge (platform-limit aware). Export = native Save-As via <a download> (no history entry, no sidecar, no new IPC). New POST /api/video/gif route (videoReverse.js mold, 2-pass palettegen/paletteuse). to_gif clapper icon added to icons.js.
